title: Forensic Sciences (Turkish) Program Educational Objectives
content:
Forensic Sciences (Turkish) Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To educate specialists who can participate in crime scene investigation and forensic laboratory processes by applying fundamental scientific knowledge acquired in biology, chemistry, physics, and related disciplines within the field of forensic sciences.

2. To train professionals who are capable of applying scientific methods in the collection, preservation, analysis, and interpretation of forensic evidence, while demonstrating awareness of ethical and legal responsibilities.

3. To cultivate individuals who can follow developments in the field of forensic sciences, conduct research, and carry out scientific projects and studies.

4. To prepare graduates with analytical thinking and problem-solving skills who can take active roles within the criminal justice system, particularly in expert witness services, forensic laboratory work, and crime scene investigation.

5. To educate forensic science professionals who can communicate scientifically at national and international levels, participate in interdisciplinary collaborations, and maintain a commitment to lifelong learning.
